creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
A *visual* examination of the resurrection
patch looks good. But you should have pulled
a copy of MOVED from the most recent commit
available at the time of your work. Then,
after hacking it, perform a:

$ cd <ports-dir>
$ git diff --staged >../MOVED.diff

It appears you simply performed a diff -u

HTH

--Chris
